title: Team Advancement
description: Adds an achievement that is given when the player joins a vanilla team
body:
This mod adds an achievement that is given when the player joins a team. It works by checking if the player is part of a vanilla team (the /team command).

The advancement is called `[Team Player]: Join a team` and has a red banner as the icon.

You can use this in any modpacks.

This mod was made with MCreator
